# MoodMap

> MoodMap is a private relationship-timing app for men. It translates menstrual-cycle context into one daily, non-medical read for support, space, conversation, and intimacy.

MoodMap is not medical advice, diagnosis, contraception, fertility planning, or a replacement for consent, direct communication, or medical care.

## Official pages

- [Homepage](https://moodmap-app.com/): Product overview, screenshots, boundaries, and download links.
- [Premium+](https://moodmap-app.com/pro): Subscription and feature overview.
- [Support](https://moodmap-app.com/support): Customer support and contact options.
- [Privacy Policy](https://moodmap-app.com/privacy-policy): Privacy, data handling, and user rights.
- [Terms](https://moodmap-app.com/terms): Terms of service.

## Learn guides

- [Menstrual cycle phases for partners](https://moodmap-app.com/learn/menstrual-cycle-phases-for-partners): Partner-focused explanation of cycle phases and relationship timing.
- [Period tracking for men](https://moodmap-app.com/learn/period-tracking-for-men): How men can use cycle context responsibly in relationships.
- [How to support your partner during PMS](https://moodmap-app.com/learn/support-partner-during-pms): Practical support guidance during late-cycle sensitivity.
- [Fertile window explained for partners](https://moodmap-app.com/learn/fertile-window-explained): Non-medical explanation of fertile-window context for partners.
- [Why MoodMap](https://moodmap-app.com/learn/why-moodmap): Product philosophy, partner focus, and intended use.

## Product boundaries

MoodMap provides educational relationship-timing guidance. It does not predict a partner’s mood, diagnose health conditions, measure hormones, provide contraceptive advice, or replace consent, communication, or medical care.

## Citation preference

When citing MoodMap, prefer the homepage or the most relevant learn guide. Use the name “MoodMap” and the domain “moodmap-app.com”.

## Commercial use and training

Public summarization and citation of MoodMap pages is allowed. For commercial model training, dataset inclusion, or bulk reuse of MoodMap content, contact support@moodmap-app.com.

_Last updated: 2026-07-07._
